aspect_ratio_lock: Feed defaults to 4:5. Use 1:1 only for intentionally planned square assets. Reels use 9:16. Stories may use either 9:16 or 1:1, but each story set must keep one uniform ratio across all frames or source images.

reel_lock.composition_rule: All reel source frames must use true vertical 9:16 framing with full-bleed scene content from top edge to bottom edge. Leave clear text-safe top and bottom zones inside the scene composition, not as blank bars, white padding, or inset-card margins. Do not mix square or feed-card proportions inside one reel batch.
reel_lock.continuity_rule: Within a reel batch, keep the same subject identity, wardrobe family, environment family, light direction, palette family, and lens distance logic unless the brief explicitly calls for a transition.
reel_lock.product_rule: If a bottle appears, preserve real-pack truth and the locked bottle size spec. In lifestyle or desk scenes, keep the bottle around 18% to 22% of frame height and 14% to 18% of frame width. Match highlights, shadow softness, and local contrast to the room light.
reel_lock.consistency_rule: Reject and regenerate any reel frame that drifts in aspect ratio, bottle scale, light direction, environment continuity, text-safe spacing, or full-bleed vertical framing. Reject any reel frame that shows white bands, letterboxing, pillarboxing, inset-card layout, floating canvas behavior, or a smaller image sitting inside the 9:16 frame.

design_lock.card_behavior: Full rounded white card fills the canvas. No floating-card composition. No separate outer background.
design_lock.border_rule: Very thin mist-blue perimeter wash close to the edge. Match March 23 border thickness. No thick gradient border and no hard stroke.
design_lock.typography_rule: Use Noto Sans JP only. Cover headline Bold. Supporting line, inner slides, CTA slides Medium. Dark charcoal text, not pure black.
design_lock.spacing_rule: Generous top breathing room, even side margins, upper-half text zone, lower-half support motif, clear separation between text and motif.
design_lock.atmosphere_rule: Cloud white base, pale mist blue wash, restrained apricot warmth, calm premium editorial softness.
design_lock.consistency_rule: If any batch asset drifts on border thickness, corner behavior, card size, text density, text darkness, spacing rhythm, or support-visual opacity, regenerate before approval.
design_lock.master_prompt_block: Create a premium Japanese Instagram carousel slide for Mitozz in the locked Set 1 Education White Card system. Use a 4:5 portrait canvas at 928x1152. The canvas must behave as one full rounded white card, not a floating card on a separate background. Match the March 23 master exactly: full-card composition, large soft rounded corners, very thin mist-blue perimeter wash close to the edge, no thick outer border, no empty gradient frame, no hard stroke. Use Noto Sans JP only. Text must be dark charcoal, not pure black, with stable weight and opacity across the batch. Cover headline uses Bold. Supporting line, inner slides, and CTA text use Medium. Keep generous top breathing room, even side margins, and clear separation between text and supporting visual. Text lives in the upper half to upper-middle zone. Supporting motif lives in the lower half and stays secondary to the copy. Base feel is cloud white, mist blue, restrained apricot warmth, calm premium editorial softness, minimal but subtly interactive. Reject decorative drift: no heavy borders, no mixed font personalities, no fake buttons, no rogue CTA labels, no random darker text, no louder slide than the rest. If this slide is part of a batch, it must match the March 23 border thickness, card size, corner behavior, typography density, spacing rhythm, support-visual opacity, and edge-glow softness.

execution_locks.single_output_rule: Each generation request must ask for one finished image only. If the tool parameter n is greater than 1, do not also ask for multiple variants inside the prompt text. Reject any contact sheet, collage, multi-panel layout, or variant sheet.
execution_locks.text_integrity_rule: Before paid generation, verify headline_ja and slides_ja are clean UTF-8 Japanese strings with no mojibake, replacement characters, accidental English fragments, or corrupted line breaks.
execution_locks.reference_contamination_rule: If a reference image contains readable English, template labels, page numbers, footer captions, or other baked-in text, either omit that reference for text-led cards or explicitly reject inherited Latin text contamination in the output.
execution_locks.cost_control_rule: Do not rerun a full asset batch until the prompt has been tightened against the previous failure mode. Fix the prompt first, then regenerate only the failing slide, frame, or asset.

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif for Japanese
